events.name: colonist_conflict
events.description: Accusations of resource hoarding fracture the colony trust.

events.name: equipment_failure
events.description: The primary water recycler fails catastrophically.

events.name: epidemic
events.description: Regolith dust causes chronic respiratory inflammation.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

meta_awareness.insight: Zeph Wind whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.

diaries.text:
**Ora Flame** (fire/prophet) — Year 69

The fire in me stirs with possibility.

Tempers flared. It is each other that will kill us.
Another system down.

*— Ora Flame, prophet*

**Fen Marsh** (water/healer) — Year 69

Another year. We are still here.

Tempers flared. It is each other that will kill us.
Another system down.

*— Fen Marsh, healer*

**Ember Sto** (earth/sentinel) — Year 69

Another year. We are still here.

Tempers flared. It is each other that will kill us.
Another system down.

*— Ember Sto, sentinel*
